character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: Holds a Bible, looks around with fearful glances, and is described as falling sick with fever.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group that regains spirits and focuses on the treasure, leading the search.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Hobbles on a crutch, curses, and plans to seize the treasure, showing determination.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Warned about the fever affecting Dick.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Dead, with his body no longer present.

character_dossiers.name: Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Dead, with his ship's name branded on a packing case.
